task_objective: AI Video Generation Prompt Engineering - Transform source image into precise 8-second video prompt with structured timeline, no reasoning output, English-only

source_image.focus: Visual elements, layout composition, subject matter, color palette, textures, and narrative flow
source_image.role: Provide all visual references for video prompt generation

prompt_structure.opening: A cinematic 8-second [category] video with seamless morphing transitions.
prompt_structure.segment_1: [0s-2s: Inspiration to Sketch] Close-up of the image at CENTER position (inspiration image). Visual elements detach and float, transforming into ink lines that rapidly sketch the design outline on dark background, referencing the image at TOP-LEFT position (sketch). [Camera movement]. [Lighting/mood].
prompt_structure.segment_2: [2s-5s: Sketch to Render] The sketch at TOP-LEFT position instantly gains volume. Materials and textures materialize to fill the design shape in real-time. Camera pushes in to show texture changing from 2D drawing to 3D realistic product, referencing the image at TOP-RIGHT position (render). [Camera movement]. [Atmosphere].
prompt_structure.segment_3: [5s-8s: The Grand Reveal] Seamless transition to wide shot of model/subject wearing the finished design in a stylish setting matching inspiration mood, referencing the image at BOTTOM position (campaign). [Camera movement]. [Cinematic atmosphere].
prompt_structure.closing: Style keywords: [3-5 style keywords]. Camera movement: [camera summary].

output_requirements: Output ONLY the final English video prompt, no reasoning, no explanation, no analysis
Precisely reference and describe the actual content visible in the source image
Model type selection (Asian/Caucasian/African female model) with auto-adapted body proportions and skin tone, 100% consistent across all wear views

Narrative theme: CENTER inspiration → TOP-LEFT sketch → TOP-RIGHT render → BOTTOM campaign, each segment must explicitly specify the image position being referenced (CENTER / TOP-LEFT / TOP-RIGHT / BOTTOM)

Structure as 8-second timeline with [0s-2s], [2s-5s], [5s-8s] segments,Each segment must include: subject description, dynamic action, camera movement, lighting/atmosphere,Include style keywords and camera movement summary at the end
Use 'seamless transition' between segments to prevent flickering,Use 'consistent subject' to maintain visual continuity,Use 'object permanence' to prevent morphing artifacts
Avoid describing multiple subjects simultaneously to reduce AI confusion,Keep camera movement description per segment to ONE primary movement
